realm.name: administrator
realm.description: Manages users, configuration, billing, transactions, reporting, invoices, and clients within their tenant. Inherits manager permissions [user management, tenant config, audit log access].

clients.name: ${CLIENT_SOGETEC_API_NAME}
clients.description: Sogetec backend application, which will interact with Keycloak to validate, introspect, revoke, or create tokens. It should also be able to manage (create, delete, change password, read) users.

clients.name: ${CLIENT_SOGETEC_FRONTEND_NAME}
clients.description: Customer-facing frontend application for the Savyris platform.

clients.name: ${CLIENT_SOGETEC_ADMIN_NAME}
clients.description: Admin application for the Savyris platform.

clientScopes.name: service_account
clientScopes.description: Specific scope for a client enabled for service accounts

clientScopes.name: api-access
clientScopes.description: Custom scope to add the Savyris backend api access as an audience for authentication and token validations

clientScopes.name: organization
clientScopes.description: Additional claims about the organization a subject belongs to

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: basic
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add all basic claims to the token

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

kc.user.profile.config: {"attributes":[{"name":"username","displayName":"${username}","validations":{"length":{"min":3,"max":255},"username-prohibited-characters":{},"up-username-not-idn-homograph":{}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"email","displayName":"${email}","validations":{"email":{},"length":{"max":255}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"firstName","displayName":"${firstName}","validations":{"length":{"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"lastName","displayName":"${lastName}","validations":{"length":{"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"userId","displayName":"${profile.attributes.userId}","validations":{"multivalued":{"min":"1","max":"1"},"pattern":{"pattern":"^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-7[0-9a-fA-F]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-fA-F]{3}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12}$","error-message":"User Id is required or has wrong format"}},"annotations":{},"required":{"roles":["admin"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin"]},"multivalued":false}],"groups":[{"name":"user-metadata","displayHeader":"User metadata","displayDescription":"Attributes, which refer to user metadata"}]}

authenticationFlows.description: Method with which to verify the existing account
Flow to determine if any 2FA is required for the authentication
Flow to determine if the organization identity-first login is to be used
Flow to determine if the OTP is required for the authentication
Flow to determine if the authenticator that adds organization members is to be used
Flow to determine if any 2FA is required for the authentication
Handle what to do if there is existing account with same email/username like authenticated identity provider
Flow to determine if the OTP should be reset or not. Set to REQUIRED to force.
Flow for the existing/non-existing user alternatives
Reauthentication of existing account
Browser based authentication
Base authentication for clients
OpenID Connect Resource Owner Grant
Used by Docker clients to authenticate against the IDP
Actions taken after first broker login with identity provider account, which is not yet linked to any Keycloak account
Username, password, otp and other auth forms.
Registration flow
Registration form
Reset credentials for a user if they forgot their password or something
SAML ECP Profile Authentication Flow
